startup_initialization_flow: app/main.py imports config, database, routers, redis listener, startup checks, and logging setup.
run_startup_checks connects to PostgreSQL and Redis.
FastAPI app is created with lifespan.
lifespan creates redis_listener task on startup and cancels it on shutdown.
database_dependency_chain: app/core/config.py builds DATABASE_URL from DB_* environment variables.
app/core/database.py creates SQLAlchemy engine, Base, SessionLocal, and get_db dependency.
Routers receive db via Depends(get_db), except websocket creates SessionLocal manually.
authentication_dependency_chain: auth_service loads user by email via user_repository.
get_current_user uses HTTPBearer credentials and validate_token.
validate_token decodes JWT, extracts email, reloads User, and returns user.
redis_event_flow: checkout_state calls publish_order_event with order_created payload.
events.py publishes JSON to Redis channel orders.
redis_listener polls Redis pub/sub channel orders.
websocket_manager sends JSON to active WebSocket clients.

request_lifecycle.rest_public: Request -> router -> get_db -> service/repository -> response -> db.close.
request_lifecycle.rest_protected: Request -> HTTPBearer -> get_current_user -> validate_token -> user lookup -> router logic -> response.
request_lifecycle.chat: Request -> ChatRequest -> Redis session load -> Gemini parse -> state handler -> optional DB write/event publish -> Redis session save -> chat response.
request_lifecycle.websocket: Connect with token query param -> validate_token with manual DB session -> manager.connect -> idle loop -> disconnect cleanup.

import_observations: Routers mostly import services and schemas, but orders router directly imports update_order_status repository.
Order model imports OrderItem to support relationship loading.
No blocking circular import was observed in the audited import graph.
